privileged_info_summary: The task requires setting up five custom dimensions for the 'Research Platform' site in Matomo 5.0. Three dimensions are visit-scope (Subscription Tier, User Cohort, Traffic Source Detail) and two are action-scope (Page Category, Form Interaction). All five dimensions must be created and set to active status. The scoring system awards 18 points for each successfully created and activated dimension, with a 10-point bonus if all five are active. The total maximum score is 100 points. Custom Dimensions is a real, included-by-default feature in Matomo with database table matomo_custom_dimension containing fields: idcustomdimension, idsite, index, scope, name, active, extractions, and case_sensitive. The 'Research Platform' site is synthetically created during task setup.
